name: Calico Quiche
recipeIngredient: 9 inch unbaked single crust pastry (9 to 10)
1 can cut asparagus (10 1/2 oz.) - spears, drained
1 can golden whole kernel corn (7 oz.) - drained
recipeInstructions:
Conventional Method: Preheat oven to 375°F. Assemble the filling by beating half and half with eggs in a bowl, then stirring in asparagus, corn, ham, 1 cup of cheese, onion, salt, and pepper. Pour into the unbaked pastry shell. Sprinkle with remaining cheese. Bake for 45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
Microwave Method: Microwave the pastry shell on high for 5 to 6 minutes or until the bottom is dry and flaky. Beat half and half with eggs in a bowl, then stir in asparagus, corn, ham, 1 cup of cheese, onion, salt, and pepper. Pour into the baked shell. Microwave on low for about 25 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean, rotating halfway through cooking. When almost ready, sprinkle with remaining cheddar cheese and microwave for an additional 30 seconds before serving.
